About PLASTR

30+

Years Combined Experience

Brisbane & Surrounds

Built on craft.
Driven by detail.

PLASTR was founded by tradespeople with one thing in mind: doing the job properly. With decades of combined experience across residential homes and large-scale commercial sites, we've built a reputation on quality finishes that speak for themselves.

We work across Brisbane and surrounds, taking on projects where attention to detail is non-negotiable. Whether it's a new build, a full renovation, or a complex industrial site, our team brings the same level of care and precision to every wall, every ceiling, every surface.

No shortcuts. No compromises. Just quality work — every time.

30+

Years Combined Experience

500+

Projects Delivered

Res & Comm

Specialist Capability

What We Do

Plastering done right.
Every time.

Residential Plastering

New builds, renovations, and repairs across Brisbane. We plaster walls, ceilings, and cornices to an exceptional standard — the kind of finish that sets a home apart.

Walls · Ceilings · Cornices · Repairs

Commercial & Industrial

Large-scale projects demand consistency and experience. We deliver high-quality plaster finishes on commercial fit-outs, industrial facilities, and multi-residential developments.

Commercial · Industrial · Multi-Res

Finishing & Detailing

The difference between good and exceptional is in the detail. Our premium finishing work — from seamless joints to perfectly level surfaces — sets the standard for what plastering can be.

Premium Finish · Seamless · Level

Our Work

The work
speaks for itself.

Residential homes through to large-scale commercial sites — precision plastering across Brisbane and surrounds.

Residential

Residential Interior

Commercial

Commercial Fitout

Finishing

Premium Finish

Why Choose PLASTR

The standard
we hold ourselves to.

01

Attention to Detail

Every surface we touch is treated with precision. From seamless joins to perfectly level walls — the details are what separate a good finish from an outstanding one.

02

Proven Reliability

We show up, we deliver, we follow through. No surprises, no chasing — just consistent, on-schedule work you can build your project around.

03

Total Professionalism

From the first quote to the final coat, you deal with tradespeople who respect your time, your property, and your project as if it were their own.

04

Real Experience

Decades of combined experience means we've worked across every project type. Nothing surprises us — and that confidence shows in everything we do.

Get in Touch

Let's talk about
your project.

Serving Brisbane and surrounding areas. We provide free quotes on residential and commercial plastering jobs of all sizes — from a single room to a full development.

Brisbane CBD, North, South, East & West.
Gold Coast and Sunshine Coast by arrangement.
